This adapter runs its own MQTT broker. P: This adapter runs its own MQTT broker. Point the Lithernet Casambi gateway's MQTT client at this host and port. SSL is not supported by the gateway - use a trusted network.
The <deviceId> set in the gateway web UI: The <deviceId> set in the gateway web UI; topics are casambi/<id>/...
Number of virtual buttons to create for: Number of virtual buttons to create for injecting press/release events into Casambi (0 = none)
After a full poll cycle on start, delete: After a full poll cycle on start, delete scene/group/device objects that no longer exist on the gateway (e.g. a scene deleted in the Casambi app). Off = orphans are kept.
How long to collect feedback before the: How long to collect feedback before the cleanup runs - must exceed one full poll cycle so nothing real is missed.
Assign friendly names to scenes, groups: Assign friendly names to scenes, groups and devices by their number (as shown in the Casambi app). Names are applied as the channel name in objects, e.g. devices.12 -> "Kitchen Spot". Leave empty to keep the number.
Name: Name
